overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking from a covered colonnade through a sunny waterfront promenade and urban plaza. The scene features futuristic architecture, palm trees, a beach with distant skyscrapers across the water, and ends with the character ascending stairs while following a person in white clothing.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian colonnade with massive concrete pillars

events.description: exits the covered colonnade into bright open waterfront area

agents.ego_description: walking through the dim covered walkway toward the bright exit visible ahead

entered.detail: massive rectangular concrete support pillars lining both sides of the walkway
solid concrete ceiling creating a covered corridor effect
sandy beach visible through the end of the colonnade
calm ocean water visible beyond the beach
futuristic skyscrapers visible in the hazy distance across the water

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a massive concrete colonnade with tall pillars creating a rhythmic pattern of light and shadow. The camera moves forward through this sheltered walkway toward a bright exit where the beach and ocean become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with beach overlook

events.description: large orange rusted industrial structure comes into view on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade overlooking the beach and ocean below

notable_agents.action: person standing on the beach near the water's edge

entered.detail: large weathered orange metal building with graffiti on the side
silver metal safety railing along the edge of the promenade
tall contemporary street lamp with orange accent lighting
dark modern buildings with glass facades lining the left side

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the colonnade into bright sunlight, the scene opens onto a wide waterfront promenade. A distinctive orange rusted structure dominates the right side while the beach and ocean stretch out below the railing. Distant futuristic towers rise across the water as the camera walks along the tiled path.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza lined with palm trees between modern buildings

events.description: transitioning from waterfront view to palm tree lined urban plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza following a person in white clothing ahead

notable_agents.action: person in white clothing and red boots walking ahead toward the stairs

entered.detail: wide open plaza with large concrete paving tiles
tall palm trees with dry fronds lining the plaza
wide concrete staircase leading upward between buildings
large bridge structure visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to an urban plaza lined with palm trees and modern dark buildings. The camera follows a person in white clothing walking ahead toward a wide concrete staircase. The beach and ocean are now behind as the environment becomes more enclosed by architecture.

events.description: beginning ascent of the wide concrete staircase

agents.ego_description: ascending the concrete stairs following the person in white clothing ahead

notable_agents.action: person in white clothing ascending the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with multiple steps leading upward
tall concrete walls lining the sides of the stairway

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the ascent of a wide concrete staircase flanked by walls and buildings. The camera follows the person in white clothing upward while other pedestrians descend. Palm trees are visible in the distance as the climb continues toward a higher level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered concrete corridor into a bright, open waterfront and finally up into a dense urban plaza. It begins within a massive colonnade of tall pillars that create a rhythmic pattern of light and shadow, moving forward toward a brilliant exit. As the camera emerges into the sunlight, the scene opens onto a wide waterfront promenade featuring a rusted orange structure and a view of futuristic towers across the ocean. The environment then shifts toward an urban plaza lined with palm trees and dark modern buildings, where the camera begins following a person in white clothing. Finally, the perspective turns away from the coast to ascend a wide concrete staircase, climbing upward past other pedestrians toward a higher city level.
